description: Removes features and/or samples containing missing (NA) values
author: Michael Reich
plan:
## RemoveMissingValues GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
RemoveMissingValues is a GenePattern module that Removes features and/or samples containing missing (NA) values

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: input.file, remove.opt, output.filename
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<R2.5> <libdir>remove_missing.R remove_missing -l<libdir> -i<input.file> -r<remove.opt> -o<output.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: remove.opt
parameters.description: Remove rows, columns, or both containing missing values
